history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian woman with long, dark, slightly wavy hair and bangs is lying down, facing the camera directly. She is wearing a black t-shirt with a silver graphic design that reads "Trippy Summer 2021". Her expression is neutral, with her eyes looking straight ahead and her lips slightly parted. A delicate gold necklace is visible around her neck. She is resting against a patterned pillow with a geometric design in shades of grey and white. The background is softly lit, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a couch or bed. In the upper right corner, there is a small, cartoonish white creature with small black eyes and a mouth. The overall lighting is soft and natural, creating a relaxed and intimate mood. The color palette is dominated by the dark tones of her hair and shirt, contrasted with the lighter tones of her skin and the pillow. The style is realistic with a touch of casualness, reminiscent of a personal selfie.
